top_signals.title: Reforming the customs treatment of low value imports into the United Kingdom
top_signals.summary: This consultation announces the removal of the £135 customs duty relief for low-value imports and seeks views on certain elements of a new set of customs arrangements for these goods.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Consultation on the Introduction of Electric Vehicle Excise Duty (eVED)
top_signals.summary: A consultation setting out further detail on how eVED will work.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Strategy sells $467 million in MSTR shares, makes no bitcoin purchases as USD reserve hits $3 billion
top_signals.summary: Strategy's total holdings remain at 843,775 BTC and account for around 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth roughly $53 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Consultation on Reforming Land Remediation Relief
top_signals.summary: The government is consultation on potential reforms to make Land Remediation Relief more accessible, better targeted, and more closely aligned with the practical realities of brownfield development.

top_signals.title: Counter-terror police take over Widdecombe murder probe
top_signals.summary: Former Conservative minister was found dead at her home in Devon on Thursday

top_signals.title: Suntory PepsiCo opens biggest Asian factory amid shift from soda
Kongsberg Maritime to Acquire Berg Propulsion
top_signals.summary: Norwegian maritime technology company Kongsberg Maritime has agreed to acquire Swedish propulsion specialist Berg Propulsion in a move aimed at expanding its marine propulsion portfolio and strengthening its position across a wider range of…

top_signals.title: Barclays and Lloyds back calls to digitalise UK markets and unlock £33bn boost
top_signals.summary: Top financial institutions have rallied behind a new report calling for the government to accelerate the digitalisation of UK markets to deliver a £33bn annaul boost to the economy. The paper, backed by a 54-strong taskforce that includes the likes of Barclays, JP Morgan and Lloyds Banking Group, says the tokenisation of markets could add [...]
